candidates.why: This is explicitly the companys top-line revenue figure and matches the definition of total revenue/sales.
This is financial income, not operating revenue, so it should not be used as total revenue.
Labeled as a balancing value and slightly below Total Revenue; Total Revenue is the proper headline figure.
Minor financial income component, not total revenue.
This is explicitly the direct cost of goods sold and matches the definition of COGS.

candidates.row_label: Change in stock of biological assets at cost, raw materials and finished poducts
candidates.why: This is an inventory/biological assets stock change adjustment, not the main COGS line.
Balance sheet inventory component, not an income statement expense.
Personnel costs are classic SG&A overhead and should be included as an SG&A component.
This is a typical SG&A-type operating overhead bucket (excluding COGS, D&A, interest, taxes) and should be included.
Share-based compensation is normally an SG&A component; include even if preview values are empty per instructions.
A net operating income/expense line that functions as an overhead bucket; in absence of an explicit SG&A total, it should be included as part of SG&A components.

variables.notes: No R&D-related row label is present among the candidates, so XRD is treated as missing/zero.

candidates.why: This is interest income, not expense; not appropriate for XINT which targets interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities is part of interest expense but is only a component; there is a broader Interest Expenses line available.
This is the main interest expense line and best represents total interest cost for XINT.
Appears to be a supplemental/breakdown item; less clearly the primary total interest expense than Interest Expenses.
Capitalized interest is not the period expense recognized in the income statement; should not be used for XINT.
Represents allocation of profit to non-controlling shareholders, unrelated to interest expense.
Represents profit attributable to controlling shareholders, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; narrower than the total Interest Expenses line.
Balance sheet liability item, not the periods interest expense.
Debt principal, not interest expense.
Equity attributable to non-controlling shareholders, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; not interest expense.
Component of equity, not total book equity. Prefer a total equity line for BE.
Another component (retained/earned equity), not total equity.
Subcomponent of equity; not the full shareholders equity figure.
Represents total equity attributable to owners of the parent (excluding non-controlling interests) and is the standard book equity measure for shareholders equity.
This appears to be Total Equity plus Non-controlling interests (i.e., total equity including minorities); using this alongside a separate MIB would double count minorities.
Represents total assets/capital structure, not equity alone.
This is the income statement allocation to non-controlling interests, but for balance-sheet MIB we prefer the balance-sheet line item.
Represents profit attributable to owners of the parent, not minority interest.
This is the balance sheet minority interest (non-controlling interests) and best matches MIB.
Duplicate concept/labeling of non-controlling interests; the non-controlling interests line is sufficient.
